name: Black Coffee
overview: Dhruv Narang, aka 'The King of Romance' is desperately in search of a muse for his new romantic novel. Fate leads him to meet Hemal Shah: a bona fide anti-romance corporate. In a twisted tale of events they're forced to work together.

trailers.title: Beyond Originals | webseries | Black Coffee | Trailer - 1 | Harshita Gaur and Param Singh
